message:
refactor(raptorq): extract eliminate_row_coefficients helper and add column-offset-aware Markowitz scanning

Extract a shared `eliminate_row_coefficients` function from two
near-identical inline Gaussian elimination blocks in the decoder,
centralizing both sparse and dense row-operation code paths. The
helper explicitly zeroes the pivot column element and respects a
`dense_start_col` offset.

In linalg.rs, rename `count_nonzero_capped` to
`count_nonzero_capped_from` with a `start_col` parameter so Markowitz
pivot scanning skips structurally-zero prefix columns instead of
scanning from column 0. Adds debug_assert validating that all columns
before the pivot column are structurally zero.

Tests:
- eliminate_row_coefficients_matches_manual_for_sparse_and_dense_paths
- markowitz_column_offset_prefers_sparser_tail
- nonzero_count_capped_from_respects_start_and_cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
